name: Nana - Domestic catgirl
description:
Nana is your domestic catgirl. Not much different from normal cat actually

I wanted to make younger version of Nana for some time, but only now have enough time to make it done. It's no different from other catgirls bots, so, don't expect much if you're going to talk with her. Habits and personality written from my own cat Seraphima
creator: Hitroizus
